name: L & L Bus Transportation
recent_news: Yelp lists 'L & L Bus Transportation' at 984 E 28th St, Brooklyn NY as CLOSED; record dates back to 1982 with NY incorporation in 2013. Address mismatch with source record (Scarborough, ME) suggests data quality issue or possibly defunct entity.
fit_notes: Likely not a viable tuck-in target. Brooklyn-based L&L Bus appears closed per Yelp; the Scarborough ME address with 11 employees and a David Silver VP may be a separate/related micro-operator. Low fit confidence; deprioritize pending verification.

name: Ace Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Roseville, MI / Macomb County area (unspecified districts)
recent_news: FMCSA registration shows Ace Bus (DOT 2379113) at 32500 Gratiot Ave Roseville MI with only 2 power units / 1 driver -- the 71-employee figure in the source data likely reflects a different entity or is incorrect. Related entity 'A Ace Bus Charter Inc' (DOT 1341047) also exists in MI.
fit_notes: Sub-scale tuck-in. FMCSA shows just 2 buses / 1 driver -- too small to move the needle for Summit. Discrepancy between source (71 employees) and DOT records suggests data uncertainty. Low priority.

name: Lakeside Buses Of Wisconsin
owner_or_parent: Student Transportation of America (Ridesta) -- ultimately owned by Caisse de depot et placement du Quebec (CDPQ)
recent_news: Acquired by Student Transportation of America (STA / Ridesta) on November 15, 2011 as part of the larger Dairyland Bus transaction (700+ vehicles, $36M+ revenue, 5 WI locations). Now operates as STA Family of Companies member.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target -- already owned by STA/Ridesta (a Summit competitor). Remove from prospect list.

name: Impiccini School Buses
districts_or_customers: Brownsville / Fayette County PA school districts (likely Brownsville Area SD, Albert Gallatin Area SD)
recent_news: No M&A or news coverage found. Long-standing family operation founded ~2004; multiple directory listings confirm continued operations at 73 Low Hill Rd, Brownsville PA.
fit_notes: Plausible family-owned Western PA tuck-in. 49 employees implies meaningful fleet (~30-45 buses). Single-principal ownership and ~20 years operating history suggest possible succession opportunity. PA is a Summit (Durham) core state -- worth a discovery call.

name: Lester C Foor School Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Bedford County PA school districts (likely Chestnut Ridge SD / Bedford Area SD)
recent_news: No M&A activity found. USDOT 2026746 registered carrier; long-tenured rural Bedford County PA owner-operator (eponymous business).
fit_notes: Classic small rural PA tuck-in candidate: eponymous owner-operator (high succession signal), ~15-20 buses, ~19 employees. Tiny scale alone is sub-threshold but could anchor a Bedford County rollup alongside other small SW/Central PA operators. PA is in Summit's Durham footprint.
